hypothesis: Integrating a differentiable synthesizability predictor trained on experimental synthesis-success labels into MatAgent’s Property Evaluation stage and optimizing formation energy and synthesizability jointly will increase the fraction of generated compositions that simultaneously lie within ±0.25 eV/atom of the target formation energy and have a synthesizability score ≥0.7, while reducing the median number of iterations needed to produce such candidates by at least 30% compared to the original single-objective MatAgent.
